items.title: US embassy in Israel says non-emergency staff can leave the country
items.description: Washington's ambassador in Jerusalem reportedly told staff those wishing to leave should do so "today".

items.title: Reform UK reports by-election 'family voting' concerns to police
items.description: It comes after election observers raised concerns about "extremely high" levels of family voting.

items.title: How Hollywood and Maga aligned over Warner Bros deal
items.description: Paramount beats Netflix to the major deal, pleasing figures in DC and LA alike, the BBC's culture and media editor writes.

items.title: Waitrose to suspend mackerel sales due to overfishing concerns
items.description: The supermarket chain says it will stop sourcing fresh, chilled and frozen mackerel by 29 April.

items.title: Starmer says he will fight on after by-election defeat to Greens
items.description: The result - in a seat Labour has held for nearly 100 years - has renewed criticism of Sir Keir's leadership from Labour MPs.
